name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and melted margarine; press evenly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Blend in the sour cream and vanilla.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips and pour batter into the prepared crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 55 minutes.
8. Loosen the edges of the cake from the rim of the pan. Cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly. Garnish with whipped cream and fresh mint leaves, if desired.
